questions.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must follow the rules."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें सच बोलना ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must tell the truth."

questions.hindi: हमें समय पर पहुँचना ही होगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must arrive on time."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें seatbelt लगाना ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must wear a seatbelt."

questions.hindi: उसे बहुत थका हुआ होगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He must be very tired."

questions.hindi: हमें कानून का पालन करना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must obey the law."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें ध्यान से पढ़ना ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must study carefully."

questions.hindi: यह जरूर सच होगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This must be true."

questions.hindi: हमें अपनी जिम्मेदारी निभानी ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must fulfill our responsibility."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें धूम्रपान नहीं करना चाहिए (मना है)।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must not smoke."

questions.hindi: उसे बहुत बुद्धिमान होना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He must be very intelligent."

questions.hindi: हमें अपने वादे रखने चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must keep our promises."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें यह फॉर्म भरना ही होगा।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must fill this form."

questions.hindi: हमें पर्यावरण की रक्षा करनी ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must protect the environment."

questions.hindi: यह जरूर एक गलती होगी।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This must be a mistake."

questions.hindi: हमें अपने माता-पिता का सम्मान करना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must respect our parents."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें अपना ID card साथ रखना ही चाहिए।
questions.english: You must carry your ID card.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must carry your ID card."

questions.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
questions.english: He must have worked very hard.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He must have worked very hard."

questions.hindi: हमें अनुशासन में रहना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must stay disciplined."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें कतार में इंतजार करना चाहिए।
questions.english: You must wait in the queue.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must wait in the queue."

questions.hindi: यह जरूर एक बड़ी खबर होगी।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "This must be big news."

questions.hindi: हमें ईमानदार रहना ही चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We must be honest."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें अपना काम खुद पूरा करना चाहिए।
questions.english: You must complete your own work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You must complete your own work."

questions.hindi: उसे जरूर बहुत खुश होना चाहिए।
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + must + base verb (strong obligation, certainty, rule)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She must be very happy."
